description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.requirements: Upgrade Java Development Kit (JDK) to version 21, update build configuration files (pom.xml or build.gradle) to target Java 21, and resolve any API deprecations or breaking changes introduced in Java 9-21

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4 (latest LTS)
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot framework to version 3.4, upgrade Spring Framework to 6.x, migrate javax.* packages to jakarta.* namespace, update Spring dependencies, and resolve any breaking changes in Spring Boot 3.x

tasks.description: Upgrade project dependencies to latest compatible versions
tasks.requirements: Update all third-party dependencies to versions compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4, resolve any transitive dependency conflicts, and ensure all dependencies are secure and actively maintained
